actionUnits.condition: Test TeleportAnchorWithFade path when teleportTrigger == OnSelectEntered. Requires Fireplace_Traditional to be XR-interactable with a Collider and an XR Interactor selecting it. Note: The scene meta lists MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 631718164, guid: 474bcb49853aa07438625e644c072ee6) which is NOT TeleportAnchorWithFade (likely URP light data). A second added component exists (fileID: 1133633788) that likely is TeleportAnchorWithFade, but its MonoBehaviour block (script GUID and serialized fields incl. teleportTrigger) is missing. Provide that to confirm. Also requires a FadeCanvas instance in scene to exercise QuickFadeIn/Out.

Test TeleportAnchorWithFade path when teleportTrigger == OnSelectExited. Requires Fireplace_Traditional to be XR-interactable with a Collider and an XR Interactor that first selects, then deselects the anchor. Ensure FadeCanvas present. Need the TeleportAnchorWithFade MonoBehaviour (likely fileID 1133633788) serialized data to confirm teleportTrigger value.

Test TeleportAnchorWithFade path when teleportTrigger == OnActivated. Requires Fireplace_Traditional to be XR-interactable with a Collider and an XR Interactor that activates the anchor. Ensure FadeCanvas present. Need TeleportAnchorWithFade component details (script fileID and fields) to verify.

Test TeleportAnchorWithFade path when teleportTrigger == OnDeactivated. Requires Fireplace_Traditional to be XR-interactable with a Collider and an XR Interactor that deactivates the anchor. Ensure FadeCanvas present. Need TeleportAnchorWithFade component details (script fileID and fields) to verify.

Invoke PlayQuickSound.Play() to cover the only manual entry point. Preconditions: (1) Room_Modern is active so Awake() runs and caches AudioSource; (2) An AudioSource is present on the same GameObject with playOnAwake = false (set by OnValidate in editor), and a valid AudioClip assigned to PlayQuickSound.sound; (3) Object or a child has a Collider so Trigger interaction is permitted. Scene meta shows two added components; MonoBehaviour id 1865680030 likely corresponds to PlayQuickSound, but only id 1865680029 is expanded (guid 474bcb49853aa07438625e644c072ee6, which is not PlayQuickSound). Provide the MonoBehaviour block for id 1865680030 (or the correct id for PlayQuickSound) to confirm fields (sound, volume, randomPitchVariance).

Cover UniversalAdditionalLightData serialization callbacks on TV_FlatWallMounted. Preconditions: (1) TV_FlatWallMounted has any Collider or EventTrigger to allow a Trigger action; (2) The two added components with ids 725697787 and/or 725697792 are the UniversalAdditionalLightData MonoBehaviours corresponding to the provided script (fields include m_Version, m_UsePipelineSettings, m_RenderingLayers, m_SoftShadowQuality, etc.). Action: invoke OnBeforeSerialize and OnAfterDeserialize on each to exercise the migration/version bump logic paths.
